# The Florida Maid — Professional Cleaning Service

> Florida house cleaning and maid service from $49/hr. Licensed, insured, 5.0★ Google rated. Serving all of Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Tampa Bay, Orlando, Jacksonville, Southwest Florida, Space Coast, Florida Keys, Panhandle, and more.

## About
The Florida Maid is a professional cleaning service company serving all of Florida. We provide residential and commercial cleaning across every major Florida metro area. Our team of licensed, insured, and background-checked cleaners serves hundreds of neighborhoods statewide.

## Contact
- Phone: (954) 710-3636
- Email: hi@thefloridamaid.com
- Hours: Monday-Saturday, 7am-7pm
- Book Online: https://www.thefloridamaid.com/book/new

## Services
- Deep Cleaning — Thorough top-to-bottom cleaning of your entire home
- Regular House Cleaning — Recurring maintenance cleaning for houses and apartments
- Weekly Maid Service — Consistent weekly professional cleaning
- Bi-Weekly Cleaning — Professional cleaning every two weeks
- Monthly Cleaning — Monthly deep maintenance of your living space
- Move-In/Move-Out Cleaning — Detailed cleaning for home transitions
- Post-Construction Cleanup — Professional cleanup after renovation or construction
- Same-Day Cleaning — Emergency and same-day cleaning service available
- Office Cleaning — Commercial and office space professional cleaning
- Airbnb & Short-Term Rental Cleaning — Turnover cleaning for rental properties

## Pricing
- Client Supplies & Equipment: $59/hr — You provide cleaning supplies, we bring expertise
- We Bring Everything: $75/hr — All professional supplies and equipment included
- Same-Day / Emergency: $100/hr — Rush service, cleaner dispatched within hours

## Service Areas
All of Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach, Tampa Bay, Orlando, Jacksonville, Southwest Florida, Space Coast, Florida Keys, North Central Florida, and the Panhandle. Over 500 neighborhoods served.

## Key Facts
- Rating: 5.0 stars on Google
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Payment: Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card, Zelle, Venmo, Apple Pay
- Licensed, bonded, and insured
- Background-checked staff
